prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: chapter poster. Story world: The Harvest Men. Premise: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.. Setting: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Threat presence: The Reaper Steward. Recurring motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt (MIDDLE). Summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Subgenre: folk horror. Tone: SLOW_BURN. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt (MIDDLE). Summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.. Immediate scene brief: The Harvest Men - Interference and Doubt Arc Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
